name: Flow-04-SendDocumentChecklist
description: Triggered by INT-03 (Document Checklist Request). Retrieves the document checklist applicable to the case and sends it to the citizen via their preferred channel.

steps.name: GetCaseDetails
steps.description: Retrieve the case to determine category and type.

steps.name: GetCitizenDetails
steps.description: Retrieve the citizen to determine preferred channel.

steps.name: RetrieveChecklist
steps.description: Retrieve the document checklist for this case type and category.

parameters.note: ombudlens_casetype and ombudlens_category are integer-valued OptionSet fields; no string quoting required in OData filters.

steps.name: FormatChecklist
steps.description: Format the checklist into a citizen-friendly message.

parameters.systemPrompt: Format the following document checklist as a clear, numbered list for a citizen. Keep the language simple and friendly.

steps.name: SendViaPreferredChannel
steps.description: Send the checklist via the citizen's preferred channel.

steps.name: UpdateCaseSubStatus
steps.description: Update the case sub-status to Awaiting Documents.

outputs.name: checklistSent
outputs.description: Whether the checklist was successfully sent
